payload.author: claude
payload.body: Delivered: trust-rustc wrapper honors trust.toml allow/warn at build time; TrustConfig moved to trust-lints (shared); cache key folds trust.toml so config edits re-trigger. Verified end-to-end (warn/allow/bad-code). NOTE: adds anyhow+toml to trust-lints' published deps (vs. a separate trust-config crate — chose fewer crates over a leaner lint lib). LSP could now honor config too (RT-108 follow-up) since TrustConfig is shared.
